feedback.text: Its a very nice act, iwould love also a bit more fairness for a media which is getting more and more lost over time, just becasue Devs and Publisher of games have no plans for Videogames and its a shame... I love them and espacially one game i really liked and i cannot play for a very long time is Darkspore, the game also didnt even needed only online play it could have had easily a singleplayer and a added multiplayer or even peer to peer system, but it was closed and is now utterly unplayable, for me its also a very unfair practice but also with other games you either still can buy and you dont know when the game will either be shut down or if there are even plans to make the game available in any sort of way, it would be nice as a consumer to atleast have know about it and not only 30 days early if they atall even say it... Babylons Fall( release:3.March.2022 shutdown:27.february.2023 ) is also a game that was very fast to just shut down and is now unplayable, yes its not the best game many might cry about but still the way these games go is just also not a nice way for people who worked for years on these games and the people who buy these games who are mostly the ones getting fooled, since there are many i can still play like moorhuhn or other games like Black and white, which is just not possible with many new games, i just would love if there was something to stop it or atleast a system in place for players to create their own servers and do something with the stuff they bought and love! and if nothing helps atleast not only a warning but the knowledge i am not buying a game which will shutdown in under a year!
